steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “fails to account for several recent archaeological discoveries” and “would need to address recent finds to be convincing” reveals that the author sees the claim as lacking sufficient evidence.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Tenuous means weak or insufficiently supported—exactly the quality of an argument that fails to account for important findings. The other three point to different concerns. That matches choice B — B is correct.
